message:
feat(auth): make all OAuth constants overridable via env vars [bd-2vbks]

Add oauth_param() helper and per-constant accessor functions so every
compiled-in OAuth client ID, URL, secret, and scope can be overridden
at runtime via PI_* environment variables without rebuilding.

Covers all five providers: Anthropic, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI,
Google Antigravity, and Kimi. ~20 accessor functions wrapping every
hard-coded OAuth constant.

Also replaces IDE_UNSPECIFIED/PLATFORM_UNSPECIFIED in Google project
discovery payloads with real CLI/platform values from the new
platform module (ideType: "CLI", platform: os_name().to_uppercase()).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
